title: Totem_of_VD
description: This resource pack adds totems in the form of VD server players to the game
body:
This resource pack will add many different totems to your game with the image of famous players of the popular VD server. (Permissions to use these players are from the players themselves)

The names that are needed to get the player's skin instead of the totem are in the file Totems.txt 

To get a variation of the totem instead, you can assign _ and then write some number or letter. It all depends on the specific totem! But if you want to see all the options, you can see them in Totems.txt .

This resource pack will help you to play better and communicate with other players of such a server as VD.


NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT [PRODUCT/SERVICE/EVENT/etc.]. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT
